creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text:
I have created a pull request at:

https://github.com/daemonblade/freebsd-eclipse/pull/7

There arn't many changes so you might just want to apply them directly.

I managed to fix my environment and my latest build produced a working eclipse binary. Eclipse started fine, but its late so I dont have time to see how well  it works. My machine has webkit2-gtk3-2.34.6_3 built from ports, in the past I have manually patched this to get eclipse to work, but I think this is just the ports version.
